name: Warmly

auth.notes: MCP uses OAuth at https://opps-api.getwarmly.com/api/mcp. REST uses per-org API keys with Authorization: Bearer $WARMLY_API_KEY and organizationId.

rateLimits: MCP 60/min free, 120/min paid; shared monthly credits.
pagination: list_warm_visitors supports take 1-500 plus offset; list_warm_accounts uses the same shape minus contact-level filters. Execution listing can filter by toolName, status, externalRef, or date range.
notes: Warmly is strongly agent-ready through official MCP and REST API docs in the launch documentation.
The public surface includes MCP endpoint, REST base URL, auth, tool names, input limits, pagination-style inputs, execution polling, rate limits, credits, and troubleshooting.
MCP exposes read-only sync tools by design; async write tools and webhooks are described as future work.
